summary.intent: Create a PR for the moltis/power-euphonium branch and address Greptile automated code review comments.
summary.outcome: PR #734 was created, 3 of 4 Greptile issues were fixed (dedup test P1, state.subscribed check P2, watchPageErrors lifecycle P2), changes were committed and pushed, and Greptile threads were resolved.

repo: sendRpcFromPage and isRetryableRpcError helpers are duplicated across ~10 files — this is an established pattern in the codebase, not accidental duplication.
Greptile is configured as a CI check on moltis PRs and completes automatically; results are available via PR reviews and inline comments.

code.finding: watchPageErrors was being called redundantly inside each individual test instead of once in beforeEach via closure, causing lifecycle issues.

workflow: Greptile review results are fetched via PR reviews API and inline comments API separately.
Biome is used for linting JS/TS files in this repo (not ESLint).
The review-pr skill handles VCS platform detection, Greptile triggering, and comment resolution automatically.

friction: One of the 4 Greptile comments (helper duplication) was flagged as a false positive / pre-existing pattern and intentionally skipped rather than acted on.
open_items: Helper functions sendRpcFromPage and isRetryableRpcError are duplicated across ~10 files; consolidating them into a shared module is deferred tech debt.
